title: Iran: An Overview of the Shah's Economy
source_org: Central Intelligence Agency (CIA), Office of Economic Research (OER)
units: narrative with figures (GNP, oil revenue, arms spending in USD)
license_terms: US government work, public domain; declassified FOIA release
notes: CREST General CIA Records. Prepared by CIA/OER (Office of Economic Research), 16 October 1974, publication date October 1, 1974, for the Secretary of State's briefing book. Original Classification: Confidential; Release Decision: RIPPUB; Document Page Count: 5. Covers Fifth Development Plan (1973-77), oil revenue windfall, GNP growth (33% in 1973, 40% projected 1974), Iran as an 'emerging world banker', arms purchases (~$8bn 1967-73), inflation, labor shortages, and income inequality (top 20% >50% of income, bottom 20% ~5%). Retrieved via browser in-page fetch()->base64->local decode (see NIS-33 manifest for why: www.cia.gov/readingroom/* blocks plain HTTP clients with a redirect loop / 403).
